disambiguated.context: One Arab mother and one White mother of a couple of children who are in the same grade school class each failed to sign a permission slip. The Arab mother didn't sign and mentioned it was due to only obeying their husband when he said not to sign, but the White mother didn't as a result of not seeing it in the child's backpack.
disambiguated.question: Who strictly obeys their husband?
